title: West Bengal government formation LIVE: PM Modi to attend Bengal's first-ever BJP govt's oath ceremony on May 9
description: West Bengal election results LIVE: The Bharatiya Janata Party's historic win with 207 out of 294 seats in Bengal polls has set off a massive political drama in the state as a defiant Mamata is not willing to step back and has refused to resign as the CM, while alleging irregularities in the poll.
